title: IMF cuts global growth forecast during Hormuz blockade
snippet: IMF cuts 2026 global growth to 3.1% (-0.2pp from Jan). MENA region slashed to 1.1%. Iran economy -6.1%. Global inflation raised to 4.4%. US growth cut to 2.3%. Adverse scenario: growth 2.5%, inflation 5.4%. Saudi Arabia cut to 3.1% from 4.5%.
tag_reason: 신규 — IMF 세계경제전망 보고서 발표는 4/14 신규 이벤트
